title: What are the black patches on the Evas backs
display_title: What are the black patches on the Evas backs
wikitext:
[]: What are the black patches on the Evas' backs?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Jun 05, 2016 1:48 pm I'm talking about these things: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What are the black patches on the Evas' backs?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Jun 05, 2016 2:01 pm Aesthetic color choice?

[]: Re: What are the black patches on the Evas' backs?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Jun 05, 2016 2:07 pm I thought it was for them to be carried when they're attached to the airplanes.

[]: Re: What are the black patches on the Evas' backs?             Quote Post by Glor » Sun Jun 05, 2016 6:18 pm Exhaust ports maybe? Could also be what ChadPrime said.

[]: Re: What are the black patches on the Evas' backs?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 06, 2016 1:27 am I remember in EoE you can clearly see Eva-01's energy wings emerging through those particular pieces of armor, but as for the new movies I've no idea. Can't imagine they're all that important.

[]: Re: What are the black patches on the Evas' backs?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Jun 06, 2016 6:52 pm They probably aren't. If they were, then we wouldn't have to guess what they do! A vent or docking port makes as much sense as anything else, really!
